title: dryopteris maximowicziana var. rhodolepis
intro: Dryopteris maximowicziana var. rhodolepis, also known as the Japanese lady fern or autumn fern, is a type of deciduous fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris maximowicziana var. rhodolepis include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting liver function. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
